global_priority.description: Fields where the reference source (LC/BL/NLS) wins on conflict

local_priority.description: Fields that always preserve local values — never overwrite even if reference source has a value

fields.003: MARC org code — local system identifier
fields.035: System control number — local ILS number
fields.856: Electronic access — check but preserve local URLs

merge_logic.green_auto_merge: similarity_score >= 0.85 — accept reference value, no review needed
merge_logic.yellow_review: 0.50 <= similarity_score < 0.85 — flag for optional review, default accept reference
merge_logic.red_manual: similarity_score < 0.50 — mandatory HITL review, trigger tie-breaker protocol
merge_logic.tie_breaker: If two reference sources conflict at red severity, invoke third 'juror' library defined in config.json
